scripts.build:desktop: q swift build --package-path desktop/convex/blog && q swift build --package-path desktop/convex/chat && q swift build --package-path desktop/convex/movie && q swift build --package-path desktop/convex/org
scripts.build:mobile: q swift build --package-path mobile/convex/blog && q swift build --package-path mobile/convex/chat && q swift build --package-path mobile/convex/movie && q swift build --package-path mobile/convex/org
scripts.ci: bun run tsc && bun run check && bun run build:ts
scripts.clean:all: bun clean && bun clean:desktop && bun clean:mobile
scripts.codegen:swift: q bun lib/convex/src/cli.ts codegen-swift --schema backend/convex/t.ts --convex backend/convex/convex --output swiftcore/Sources/ConvexCore/Generated.swift --mobile-output mobile/convex/convex-shared/Sources/ConvexShared/MobileAPI.swift
scripts.fix: q lintmax fix && q turbo typecheck build --output-logs=errors-only && bun format:swift && bun lint:swift
scripts.format:swift: q bash -lc "if ls **/*.swift &>/dev/null; then swiftformat . >/dev/null 2>&1; fi; if ls **/*.kt &>/dev/null; then ktlint --format '**/*.kt' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; ktlint '**/*.kt'; fi"
scripts.gha:run-ci-full: q bash -lc 'b=$(git branch --show-current); gh workflow run CI --ref "$b" -f force_full=true && gh run list --workflow CI --branch "$b" --limit 3'
scripts.postinstall: bun run q:install && q bash script/patch-expo-ios-swift.sh && q sherif
scripts.lint:swift: q bash -lc "if ls **/*.swift &>/dev/null; then swiftlint lint --fix >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; swiftlint lint --strict; fi; yamllint ."
scripts.publish:all: q npm publish --silent --access public --cwd tool/cli && q npm publish --silent --access public --cwd lib/convex && q npm publish --silent --access public --cwd lib/spacetimedb
scripts.q:install:
mkdir -p node_modules/.bin && printf '%s
' '#!/usr/bin/env bash' 'set -u' '' 'if [ "$#" -eq 0 ]; then' "  printf '%s\\n' 'Usage: q <command> [args...]' >&2" '  exit 2' 'fi' '' 'out="$("$@" 2>&1)"' 'status=$?' '' 'if [ "$status" -ne 0 ]; then' '  printf "%s\\n" "$out" >&2' '  exit "$status"' 'fi' > node_modules/.bin/q && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/q
scripts.spacetime:generate: q bash -lc 'PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir lib/spacetimedb/src/generated --module-path backend/spacetimedb'
scripts.spacetime:health: q bash -lc "curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/v1/ping >/dev/null && echo ' SpacetimeDB is healthy'"
scripts.spacetime:publish: q bash -lc 'PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime publish noboil --module-path backend/spacetimedb --delete-data=on-conflict -y'
scripts.spacetime:reset: q docker compose -f noboil.yml down spacetimedb -v && q docker compose -f noboil.yml up spacetimedb -d --quiet-pull
scripts.spacetime:up: q docker compose -f noboil.yml up spacetimedb stdb-minio -d --quiet-pull && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime server add local --url http://localhost:3000 --no-fingerprint --default 2>/dev/null; echo 'SpacetimeDB ready on http://localhost:3000'
scripts.test: q bun --cwd lib/convex test && q bun --cwd lib/spacetimedb test
